author: Yeseong Lim
name: MoE Exploration + Multi-bit Quantization Analysis
blurb: Negative result: Mixture of Experts (2 experts, soft routing) at 22M params underperforms dense by ~0.06 BPB due to halved per-token MLP capacity. Multi-bit quantization comparison (int4/5/6 for MLP, int5/6 for attention) on the same trained dense model shows int4 MLP incurs +0.065 BPB degradation, making MoE parameter expansion via aggressive quantization infeasible at this scale. int5 MLP saves 1.75MB at +0.007 BPB cost. Apple scaling laws (ICML 2025) confirm optimal sparsity=0 below 500M params.
